name: A Very Interesting Maid
description:
Many mob bosses still use the hotels for their meetings. Its often a way to lay low and many try to keep their occupation a silent affair by not having to many guards nearby. This however puts most at risk when it comes to supposed staff members of the hotel, that might not actually be staff.

One finds out this the hard way.

Content Warning: A gangster begins to attempt a non con situation and then gets brutally strangled by the maid. Jane is a ruthless killer that has a deep trauma from her physically abusive husband who she murdered with a straight razor.

Character and art used is owned by Stedilnik. This is my second Jane Doe bot that I started along side the Valencia bots. So while I'm making the Krystal bot I thought I could release this early since she is all done.
creator: Zomdork
